description_long: This object is an open-faced sandwich served on a round wooden board. The sandwich consists of a thick slice of rustic bread topped with a generous layer of creamy white spread, likely cream cheese, and several slices of smoked salmon arranged neatly on top. Garnished with fresh microgreens and herbs, the sandwich has a vibrant and appetizing appearance. The bread appears crusty and artisanal, with a slightly uneven edge, and the salmon is a rich orange-pink color with visible marbling. The wooden board is smooth and circular, providing a natural, rustic presentation. Some small crumbs and bits of garnish are scattered around the sandwich, enhancing its realistic, freshly-prepared look.
description: An open-faced smoked salmon sandwich with cream cheese and microgreens on rustic bread, served on a round wooden board. The presentation is fresh and appetizing with vibrant colors and natural textures.
description_view_0: The sandwich is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the thickness of the bread and the layered salmon with microgreens on top.
description_view_1: A side view showing the sandwich cut in half, revealing the creamy spread and the full length of the salmon slices.
description_view_2: A top-down angle emphasizing the garnish and the uneven, rustic edge of the bread.
description_view_3: A rear angle showing the back of the sandwich halves and more of the wooden board's surface.
